items.title: Via Stein/Fischer, "New Orleans has been exploring various trade frameworks to send out former lottery pick Jordan Hawkins for some potential roster & financial flexibility."
items.author: Mason Ginsberg
items.body_excerpt:
Via Stein/Fischer, "New Orleans has been exploring various trade frameworks to send out former lottery pick Jordan Hawkins for some potential roster & financial flexibility."

This is the same "brain trust" that picked up this year's player option last summer.
